sql_array: CREATE TABLE users (username VARCHAR(50), password VARCHAR(50), auth_digest VARCHAR(32));
INSERT INTO users (username, password, auth_digest) VALUES ('u1', 'secret', NULL);
UPDATE users SET auth_digest = vsp_calculate_digest('u1', 'secret', app_auth_vec('Authorization: Digest ...')) WHERE username = 'u1';
SELECT username, auth_digest FROM users WHERE auth_digest IS NOT NULL;
DELETE FROM users WHERE username = 'u1' AND auth_digest = vsp_calculate_digest('u1', 'secret', app_auth_vec('Authorization: Digest ...'));
